products.title: Brazilian Santos
products.description: This coffee comes to us from the Mogiana region in southern Brazil. It is called Santos which refers to the port from which it is exported. It is a nice easy drinking coffee and has been a favourite of our customers for a long time.
tags: NOTES-Medium body# Chocolate and nutty notes# nice smooth finish# low acidity

products.title: Burundi
products.description: This coffee comes from Burundi, a small country located in the African Great Lakes region, where East Africa and Central Africa meet. Burundi is an up and coming origin that is producing very interesting coffees. This offering comes from the Kayanza province.
tags: NOTES-Sweet and creamy with citric acidity# toffee and lemon flavours

products.title: Colombian Decaf
products.description: Colombian coffee creates a rich, smooth and sweet tasting drink with a subtle nutty flavour and a complex aroma.
tags: NOTES-bold# strong body & aroma# slight hint of chocolate

products.title: Colombian Huila Supremo
products.description: Colombian coffee is the classic specialty coffee. Many people's first exposure to better coffee was when they first tasted a crisp Colombian. This offering from the Huila region is an exceptional coffee that is easy to drink and brimming with flavour
tags: NOTES-bold# strong body & aroma# slight hint of chocolate

products.title: Colombian Mujeres en Cafe
products.description: High in the mountains of Caldas, Colombia (1500 - 1900 masl), a remarkable coffee is cultivated by Mujeres en Café, a collective of 770 women farmers dedicated to crafting exceptional coffee while empowering female producers. This fully washed coffee delivers a smooth, balanced cup with rich notes of roasted nuts, creamy chocolate, and a sweet hint of vanilla. A touch of subtle citrus brightness adds vibrancy, leading to a clean, lingering finish. With its versatile profile, this medium roast is just as delightful brewed as a bold espresso as it is as a gentle pour-over. More than just a coffee, this is a movement. 100% of proceeds from this special edition will go to CARE CANADA, a global leader in fighting poverty with a focus on empowering women and girls. With approximately 300 bags available, we aim to raise $7,500 to support this important cause. Enjoy a remarkable coffee that not only tastes incredible but also makes a real difference.
tags: NOTES-Roasted Nuts# Smooth Chocolate# Hint of Vanilla# Subtle Citrus Brightness

products.title: Costa Rican SWP Decaf
products.description: Costa Rica produces one of the worlds best gourmet coffees. The near-perfect growing conditions of this region- high altitude, rich volcanic soil, and combination of sunlight, temperature and precipitation all contribute to the awesome elegance of this world class coffee.
tags: NOTES-Full body# nice rich taste# great finish# slightly fruity

products.title: Costa Rican Tarrazu
products.description: one of the true coffee classics and not to be missed. Coffee aficionados agree that the Tarrazu region of Costa Rica produces one of the worlds best gourmet coffees. Costa Rican Tarrazu coffee beans carry an unusual silky flavor, a splendid aroma with a hint of nut and fruit tones, a well-balanced body and pleasant acidity.
tags: NOTES-Full body# nice rich taste# great finish# slightly fruity

products.title: Daterra Farms Auction Lot: Heitor
products.description: This special coffee was part of Daterra's auction in 2022. It was inspired by the composer Heitor Villa-Lobos, considered the "Father of Brazilian classical music," known for fusing native Brazilian music with European classical music and African rhythms.Daterra is one of the world-famous farms in Brazil, where coffee is produced with an inspiring commitment to quality and sustainability. All Daterra Farms coffees have been Rainforest Alliance certified since 2003, meaning the coffee is grown on farms where forests, rivers and soils are protected; wildlife is conserved; workers are paid decent wages and given access to medical care and education.The coffee beans are of the Datopia varietal, a unique blend of eight heirloom varietals from the regions of Kaffa, Harar and Shewa in Ethiopia, brought to Daterra by the Agronomic Institute of Campinas (IAC). This varietal is known for its resilience to climate change, pests, and diseases and its unique and desirable flavour profile. The producer cupping notes for this coffee are Earl grey tea, peach, apricot, brown sugar, and citric acidity.
tags: NOTES-Earl grey tea# Peach# Apricot# Brown sugar# Citric acidity

products.title: Daterra Farms Bourbon Collection
products.description: A complex and beautifully bright coffee. A sweet citrus-like acidity makes the body of this coffee glisten with flavors of sweet mandarin, rich dark chocolate and caramel. The finish is filled with high notes of sweet fruits and bittersweet chocolate.

products.title: Daterra Farms Espresso Yellow
products.description: Daterra Farms Espresso Yellow is an absolute delight every time. It's perfect for espresso as it's a thicker-bodied coffee. The coffee beans carry an intense dry aroma with hints of chocolate and fruits. It is amazingly full-bodied, rich and lively with moderate acidity. Aromatic, full-bodied- perfect for espresso. Rich and lively with moderate acidity. Hints of chocolate and fruits.

products.title: Daterra Farms Full Bloom
products.description: An elegant and refined fully natural coffee begins its journey at the peak of the harvest when the cherries are filled with honey-like liquor. The beans start drying on the tree, then transferred in cherry to the patio, until the honey is almost dissolved.

products.title: Daterra Farms Sweet Blue
products.description: Sweet Blue is an outstanding blend with a superb aroma. It tastes like an elegant dark and spicy chocolate bar. It has delicate acidity blended with flavors of lightly roasted almond and pleasant spicy chocolate are a precursor to a dense and interestingly textured body.
tags: NOTES-Great Body# Spicy Chocolate# Roasted Almonds

products.title: Daterra Farms Sweet Collection
products.description: Daterra Farms Sweet Collection is an exceptional blend which is sweet as well as crema abundant. This coffee was used by 2006 World Barista Champion Klaus Thomsen in his winning signature blend. Balanced and persistent, this coffee offers sweet fruity aroma, delicate acidity with long lasting citrus aftertaste. It creates a smooth body and flavor includes vanilla-caramel notes to the cup. Sweet fruity aroma and citrus notes Balanced, smooth body and delicate acidity Vanilla-caramel flavor, crema abundant

products.title: El Salvador Sweet Panela Pacamara
products.description: A distinctive natural-processed Pacamara from the renowned San Carlos Estate in La Libertad, El Salvador. This exceptional coffee comes from the Borgonovo Pohl family, who have been producing specialty coffee since 1971 and are now in their third generation of coffee excellence.Grown in rich volcanic soil at elevations between 800-1300 meters, this rare Pacamara varietal - a hybrid of Pacas and Maragogype - produces exceptionally large beans with complex flavor characteristics. The natural processing method, known locally as "Sweet Panela," enhances the coffee's inherent sweetness while preserving the unique terroir of El Salvador.San Carlos Estate is known for their commitment to quality and sustainability. The coffee is processed immediately at their family-owned mill, ensuring the preservation of inherent flavors and aromas. This meticulous approach has made their coffee a top choice for discerning roasters worldwide.Medium roasted to highlight the natural sweetness and complexity that the Pacamara variety and natural processing bring to the cup.
tags: NOTES-Rich# Sweet# Heavy Body# Stone Fruits# Cherry

products.title: Essential Espresso
products.description: Essential Espresso is our take on a timeless classic - crafted to bring great, freshly roasted coffee to everyone. This 100% Arabica blend of both naturally processed and washed coffees delivers rich, velvety crema and a smooth, balanced flavour that shines both straight as a shot and in milk-based drinks like lattes and cappuccinos. Expect a nutty taste with a dark chocolate finish and just a hint of citrus fruit to keep things lively. Its heavy body and bold character are sure to satisfy anyone craving that classic Italian café experience. And despite its name, Essential Espresso isn’t just for the espresso machine. It’s versatile enough to brew beautifully as drip, pour-over, or even in a French press - so you can enjoy it any way you like.
tags: NOTES-nutty taste# dark chocolate finish#  hint of citrus

products.title: Essential Espresso Decaf
products.description: Essential Espresso Decaf is our take on a timeless classic - crafted to bring great, freshly roasted coffee to everyone, without the caffeine. This 100% Arabica blend of both naturally processed and washed coffees delivers rich, velvety crema and a smooth, balanced flavour that shines both straight as a shot and in milk-based drinks like lattes and cappuccinos. Decaffeinated using the Swiss Water Process (SWP), it keeps all the character you love in Essential Espresso. Expect a nutty taste with a dark chocolate finish and just a hint of citrus fruit to keep things lively. Its heavy body and bold character are sure to satisfy anyone craving that classic Italian café experience. And despite its name, Essential Espresso Decaf isn’t just for the espresso machine. It’s versatile enough to brew beautifully as drip, pour-over, or even in a French press - so you can enjoy it any way you like.
tags: NOTES-nutty taste# dark chocolate finish#  hint of citrus

products.title: Ethiopian Harrar
products.description: The Harrar region, which is on the eastern side of Ethiopia, produces some of the most fascinating coffees in the world. Harrar large coffee beans have an intense flavor of tropical fruit and blueberries with smooth chocolate notes. You will find Ethiopian Harrar coffee to have a rich body, room filling aroma, crisp finish with pleasant acidity.

products.title: Ethiopian Sidama
products.description: This coffee is lesser known than its very famous neighbour Yirgacheffe but it deserves attention in its own right. It has the rare combination of great acidity and a very full body and yields a lovely cup of coffee for anytime of day.
tags: NOTES-Smooth# Sweet# Full Bodied# Exotic Fruit# Gentle Acidity

products.title: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
products.description: It was in Ethiopia that the first coffee trees flourished centuries ago and even today the breadth of its flavour experience is profound. Yirgacheffe is a town in the Sidamo region of Ethiopia, and the coffees produced in this area will amaze you with their citrus and floral notes.
tags: NOTES-Grapefruit Like Acidity# Citrus# Floral Notes# Very Complex

products.title: Guatemala Gualvador Pacas
products.description: This exceptional coffee from Gualvador Estate showcases the unique terroir of the Chingo Volcano region. Managed by third-generation coffee grower Mr. Jaime Rios, this estate sits uniquely at the border between Guatemala and El Salvador - half in each country, hence the name 'Gualvador' combining both nations. Grown at 1,370-1500 meters above sea level, this SHB (Strictly Hard Bean) grade Pacas varietal undergoes a distinctive winey processing method that enhances its complex flavor profile. Experience sweet, winey and creamy aromas that lead into rich notes of dark chocolate, sweet cherry, and pecan pie - a true testament to the exceptional coffee-growing conditions at the convergence of two great coffee nations.

products.title: Guatemalan Antigua
products.description: Grown in the Antigua district southwest of Guatemala City, Guatemalan Antigua coffee gives you a rich, full bodied cup with notes of dry cocoa, spices aroma and a lively wine like acidity. It creates a vibrant cup of coffee with a unique finish. A classic morning coffee.
tags: NOTES-Chardonnay Like Acidity# spice# full body

products.title: Guatemalan SWP Decaf
products.description: Guatemalan Decaf gives you a rich, full bodied cup with notes of dry cocoa, spices aroma and a lively wine like acidity. It creates a vibrant cup of coffee with a unique finish without the caffeine.
tags: NOTES-Chardonnay Like Acidity# spice# full body

products.title: Haiti Savane Zombie
products.description: Coffee from Haiti is a rarity. While the altitude is lower than many regions, the cool sea breeze makes this a prime location for coffee. Coffee was brought to Haiti in the 1720’s and is one of the first regions in the new world to grow coffee. Coffee from Haiti is often called Haitian Bleu because the varietal Typica is the same that is grown in the Jamaican Blue Mountain region.

products.title: Hawaiian Kona Extra Fancy - Cancino Estate
products.description: Kona is recognized as one of the best tasting coffees in the world. Hawaii is the only place in the United States that harvests coffee. A perfect mix of humidity, sun and afternoon shade make Kona beans exceptional. Kona coffee beans produce a full bodied, sweet cup with a hint of chocolate. The coffee exhibits an alluring aroma, excellent flavour, low acidity and a clean finish. Smooth as silk, it rolls over your tongue like warm butter.
tags: NOTES-Sweet Chocolate# Mild Acidity# Amazing Body# Clean Finish

products.title: Indian Monsooned Malabar
products.description: Indian Monsooned Malabar is for the most ardent coffee enthusiasts. One of the most unusual coffees in the world, Monsooned Malabar is prepared during the monsoon season at the Malabar Coast in India. The coffee beans are exposed to the moisture-laden winds of the monsoon season. As the beans absorb the moisture of the windy air, they not only expand in size but take on a distinctive syrupy sweetness. Monsooned Malabar features a spicy, earthy undertone, mild acidity and complex aroma.
tags: NOTES-Earthy# No Acidity# Smokey# Very Full and Rich Body

products.title: Jamaican Blue Mountain Clydesdale Estate
products.description: Start your day with the aroma and taste of Blue Mountain. Grown on the eastern end of the beautiful island of Jamaica in the majestic range of hills called Blue Mountains, it is the world's most revered coffee due to the rare availability and refined taste. The coffee of James Bond and Damian Marley alike.
tags: NOTES-Gentle# Perfectly Balanced# Velvety Body# Sweet with floral# spicy# and citric undertones.

products.title: Kenyan AA
products.description: The rich taste of the Kenyan Coffee is appreciated by coffee aficionados and connoisseurs all over the world. Kenyan AA is the largest bean grown in the rich fertile soils around Mount Kenya. The Kenyan AA coffee beans brew up a rich, intense cup of coffee with a winy taste and a pronounced fruity undertone.
tags: NOTES-Bright Acidity# Full Body# Cranberry# Complex Layers of Fruit

products.title: Mexican Altura
products.description: Sweet coffee. Crisp, nutty aroma on the nose, with a full, rich flavor, very balanced once in the cup. Medium body, fine and balanced acidity. Smooth, sweet flavor of nuts and chocolate on the palate.

products.title: Nicaragua SHG
products.description: SHG (Strictly High Grown) is a term used to classify coffee grown above 1350 Meters, this is the highest grade of coffee in Nicaragua. This washed coffee produces a clean and satisfying cup and it is good anytime of day.

products.title: Nicaraguan Cafe Diego Premium Maragogipe
products.description: Immerse in the luxuriously rare experience of the Nicaraguan Cafe Diego Premium Maragogipe. Originating from the verdant Nicaraguan landscapes, this coffee features the exceptional Maragogipe varietal - often dubbed "elephant coffee beans" due to their large size compared to other Arabica beans. Every bean tells a tale of nature's unpredictability, tracing back to a spontaneous mutation of the Typica coffee in Maragogipe, Bahia in Brazil. The varietal's taste remarkably hinges on its soil, with poor soils often culminating in diminished flavours. However, when carefully nurtured, these beans are capable of developing flavors that challenge this narrative. Our Cafe Diego Premium Maragogipe is a testament to this potential. Expertly processed via the washed method and roasted to a perfect medium, each brew promises to unveil a symphony of floral and chocolate notes, underpinned by a modest acidity. The finish? A long-lasting, juicy sweetness that lingers, leaving your palate yearning for more. So, whether you're a coffee connoisseur seeking rare finds or someone who simply loves a unique brew, this Nicaraguan gem is an indulgence you wouldn't want to miss.
tags: NOTES-Floral# Chocolate# Medium Acidity# Juicy Sweet Aftertaste

products.title: Papua New Guinea
products.description: Cultivated at a high altitude in rich volcanic soil, Papua New Guinea coffee beans create a distinct aroma, very full body with low acidity

products.title: Peru SHB
products.description: SHB (Strictly Hard Bean) is a term used to classify coffees grown above 1350 meters, this is the highest grade of coffee in Peru. This versatile coffee does well with all kinds of preparation methods from Aeropress to French Press to Espresso.
tags: NOTES-Sweet# herbaceous# savory# citric with cocoa flavors.
VARIETAL-Caturra# Typica# Catimor# Mundo Novo# Pache

products.title: Segafredo Extra Strong - 2.2lb
products.description: Segafredo Zanetti- the leading Italian Espresso producer represents the passion to spread the Italian taste in every corner of the world. Their coffee blends are created using the top class Arabica and Robusta beans, which give unmistakable aroma and body to the Italian Espresso. Besides coffee, the Segafredo Zanetti produces cocoa, tea and spices to satisfy the various taste needs of their clients.Segafredo Extra Strong Italian coffee beans give you the aromatic espresso you take pride in. Segafredo Extra Strong is an exclusive blend of top quality Brazilian Arabica and Robusta coffee creating a balanced, smooth and velvety texture with intense toasted-bread and chocolate notes which has to be tasted to be appreciated. Its suitable to create cappuccino, latte or espresso because of its richness. Composition: Arabica & Robusta coffee Intense and chocolaty Smooth and velvety texture 2.2 lbs (1 kg) whole beans

products.title: Segafredo Extra Strong - Box
products.description: Segafredo Zanetti- the leading Italian Espresso producer represents the passion to spread the Italian taste in every corner of the world. Their coffee blends are created using the top class Arabica and Robusta beans, which give unmistakable aroma and body to the Italian Espresso. Besides coffee, the Segafredo Zanetti produces cocoa, tea and spices to satisfy the various taste needs of their clients.Segafredo Extra Strong Italian coffee beans give you the aromatic espresso you take pride in. Segafredo Extra Strong is an exclusive blend of top quality Brazilian Arabica and Robusta coffee creating a balanced, smooth and velvety texture with intense toasted-bread and chocolate notes which has to be tasted to be appreciated. Its suitable to create cappuccino, latte or espresso because of its richness. Composition: Arabica & Robusta coffee Intense and chocolaty Smooth and velvety texture Box contains 6 x 2.2 lbs=13.2 lbs (6 kg) whole beans

products.title: Sulawesi Grade 1
products.description: Sulawesi also known as Celebes is one of the four Greater Sundra Islands. The large bean has a relatively low acidity, is full bodied, and strong, with a vibrant flavor and aromatic spiciness. Citric sweetness in the body, while the finish is smooth and soft
tags: NOTES-Low Acidity# Full Body# Spicy Notes# Smooth Finish

products.title: Sumatran Mandheling
products.description: Sumatran Mandheling - A classic Sumatran, earthy, full-bodied, balanced but bold. This premium Mandheling coffee features a smooth, complex taste profile with distinctive Indonesian characteristics.

products.title: Sumatran Mandheling SWP Decaf
products.description: Sumatran Mandheling SWP Decaf - Grown on the island of Sumatra, Mandheling is known for its smooth, full body, and its rich, complex taste. This coffee is named after north Sumatra’s Mandailing people - an ethnic group and not so much a region.

products.title: Tanzanian Peaberry
products.description: Tanzanian Peaberry is revered by coffee connoisseurs for its distinct taste and rare availability. Harvested on the slopes of Mount Kilimanjaro near the Kenyan border, the peaberry is a natural deviation wherein the coffee cherry develops a single oval bean rather than the normal two flat-sided beans. The coffee exhibits a well balanced body, distinguished aroma along with light acidity.

products.title: Vietnam Duc Trong Mill
products.description: Dung K'No Commune, located in the Lam Dong province of Vietnam, is known for its specialty coffee production. The farmers here cultivate coffee alongside other crops like persimmon, jackfruit, macadamia, and avocado. The coffee undergoes a washed process at the Duc Trong Mill, where it is fermented anaerobically, enhancing the intensity of fruit and acidity in the cup. The coffee is then dried on raised beds or patios for 5-7 days. The Catimor variety grown at elevations between 1100-1400 MASL results in a cup profile with intense jammy strawberry, cooked melon, mild toffee, and malt flavors, complemented by sugary sweetness and winey acidity.
tags: NOTES-Intense jammy strawberry#cooked melon#mild toffee#malt flavors#sugary sweetness#winey acidity
